rules: Tight letter spacing on headings (>32px) using tracking-tight.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do not exceed text-6xl for the main hero heading.
Use varying weights (Light vs Black) to create tension.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Dashboard uses Mode B 'Control Room' for density. Marketing uses Mode A 'Tetris' for asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.form_layout: Form is the conversion centerpiece. Use a soft Neumorphic card or solid white surface over the dark hero to make it pop.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px subtle borders on widgets to define edges without relying on heavy shadows.

components.navigation: Sticky, Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl) on light pages, or Solid dark on the hero section. Must contain prominent EN/FR/ES/KR language toggle.
components.hero: Gradient dark->green transition. Use provided abstract background image with bg-black/50 overlay to house the recharge form and '⚡ Recharge Instantane' badge.
components.recharge_form: Inviting, confidence-inspiring. 4 steps: Operator -> Phone (with country flag dropdown) -> Amount (Quick buttons $5, $10, etc., 'POPULÈ' badge) -> Pay.
components.trust_badges: Row below hero. Icons + Text: Instantané, Sécurisé, 150+ Peyi, 3000+ Kliyan.
components.operator_logos: Border-collapse grid. Logos appear desaturated (grayscale) and gain full color on hover.
components.dashboard_and_history: Greeting, quick recharge buttons (Saved Contacts), recent tx list. History needs robust filters. Status badges: Green (Success), Amber (Pending), Red (Failed).
components.footer: Must contain explicit link to parent site monican.shop.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow. Explicit text color on hover.
motion_and_interactions.form_steps: Smooth staggered fade-ins for form steps.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use subtle spinning icons or pulsing skeleton loaders, avoid full-page blocks.

icons.usage: Use duotone or regular weights for a premium fintech feel.

hero_background.description: Dark teal and green abstract gradient background for the hero section.

lifestyle_image.description: Smiling person using phone, for 'How it works' or about section.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over hero background meets APCA 3:1 for large text.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid on all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., data-testid='recharge-submit-btn', data-testid='lang-toggle-kr').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Next.js 14 App Router application focusing heavily on the central recharge form's UX.
Use the dark green background image with a bg-black/50 overlay for the hero section.
Implement the multi-language toggle (EN/FR/ES/KR) in the navigation.
For the main form, avoid standard Shadcn Card component. Build a premium custom layout.
Use Phosphor Icons for the trust badges and dashboard.
Create a grid for the 'Supported Operators' section displaying the provided Clearbit logo URLs. Make them grayscale by default and colored on hover.
Dashboard and History pages should use a dense 'Control Room' layout.
Ensure all interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
